texto: The leaving happened slowly, gradually, as these things do, and before we knew it, we were lost to each other, as if a magician had whisked a cloth off the table, leaving the dishes there, jolted. And when we looked back it was all a blur, time on fast forward, hurtling to an inevitable conclusion.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kathryn Stern: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “The leaving happened slowly, gradually, as these things do, and before we knew it, we were lost t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, divorce, life-changes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e life-changes.
